rulings.Case Title: 2331-2333-2335 JONES STREET HOA VS. KEITH GORLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 28, 2015 line 1. PETITIONER 2331-2333-2335 JONES STREET HOA's Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Continued to September 24, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the Petition (referenced in and relied upon in the points and authorities) no later than September 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 28, 2015 line 6. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted its burden and Defendant failed to create a triable issue of fact by competent evidence. Plaintiff's request for judicial notice is granted as to the existence and legal effect of the recorded documents. Defendant's request for judicial notice is denied. Additionally, no evidence is presented that Keyhan Mohanna may represent the Keyhan Mohanna trust is these proceedings per Aulisio v. Bancroft (2014) 230 Cal.App.4th 1516. = (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 28, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT BRANDON WALLACE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
